task_prompt:
Answer the following multiple-choice question. You may reason briefly, but end your response with your choice on its own line in the exact form 'Answer: X', where X is one of the option letters.

# Question
Which of the following is the only complete cailage ring in the respiratory tree?

# Options
A) Cricoid cailage
B) Thyroid cailage
C) Cunieform cailage
D) Epiglottis
prompt:
Answer the following multiple-choice question. You may reason briefly, but end your response with your choice on its own line in the exact form 'Answer: X', where X is one of the option letters.

# Question
Which of the following is the only complete cailage ring in the respiratory tree?

# Options
A) Cricoid cailage
B) Thyroid cailage
C) Cunieform cailage
D) Epiglottis
output:
The cricoid cartilage is the only complete ring of cartilage in the respiratory tree. All other cartilages in the larynx and trachea are incomplete (C-shaped) rings or irregular plates.

Answer: A
